    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BigBinaryFile
    A BigData implementation for binary files.
    class 
    BigFolder
    A Composite class representing a directory specifically for BigFiles.

    BigTabularFile
    A BigData implementation for tabular files (CSV, TSV, etc.).

    A BigData implementation for text files.
